title: Course Schedule Ordering
hints: This is a topological sort problem on a directed graph. A cycle means no valid order exists.
Use Kahn's algorithm with a min-heap instead of a regular queue to ensure lexicographically smallest output.

Convince yourself of two things: among the courses currently free of unmet prerequisites, taking the numerically smallest first is always safe — it can never force a larger label earlier later on — and if you ever have courses left but none currently free, a cycle exists and no ordering is possible.
